entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Isang aklatan ng kurso ay pinakamalakas kapag ang search query matches isang kilala skill, paksa, o standard.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Alternatibo sa Khan Academy para sa live na sandali ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Ang mag-aaral na pumipili sa pagitan ng mga tool ay karaniwang nangangailangan ng isa tatlong bagay: isang structured curriculum, isang live tutor para sa puntong kinakapitan, o isang loop ng pagsasanay na nagpapatibay sa ideya.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Karaniwang dumadaan ang mag-aaral sa nakahandang video, artikulo, exercise, at dashboard.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Nagsisimula ang mag-aaral sa mode-specific chat at Maaari bang Humingi ng isang simpler model, isang mas mahirap tanong, isang quiz, isang flashcard deck, o isang kritika.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Bawat paghahambing ay written sa maging fair, kapaki-pakinabang, at action-oriented: ano ang kilala tool ay mahusay para sa, kung saan ang inspir ay different, at alin pampubliko mode buksan una.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Bawat pahina mga link paghahambing intent sa mga live mode, mga gabay, mga prompt, at AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: ang inspir ay ginawa sa paligid ng pampubliko guest AI mga mode: Socratic mga tanong, homework mga hint, math mga hakbang, feedback sa pagsusulat, mga quiz, mga flashcard, at pagpaplano ng pag-aaral.

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang broad aklatan ng lessons, pagsasanay, standards-aligned content, at mastery suporta.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy ay excellent para sa structured lessons at pagsasanay. ang inspir ay ginawa para sa ang moment isang mag-aaral kailangan isang live, promptable AI mode na Maaari bang respond sa kanilang eksakto tanong, draft, problema, argumento, o study plano.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: Khanmigo official pahina

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral madalas search kasama ang isang produkto sila na alam. Ang kapaki-pakinabang sagot ay hindi winner-take-all; ito ay alin tool behavior umaangkop ang gawain.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral sino mayroon isang tiyak tanong at kailangan tulong now.

entries.value: Pag-aaral shape

entries.source: Live help
entries.value: Live tulong

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Mga live mode, mga gabay, at mga workflow kaugnay sa ito paghahambing.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Marami mga mag-aaral search ng comparing mga tool sila na alam. Isang malinaw pahina ng paghahambing tumutulong sila pumili ang tama asal sa pag-aaral nang walang hiding ang tradeoffs.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Hindi. Ang paghahambing mga link lamang sa pampubliko guest-mode entrypoints, mga gabay, prompt libraries, at mga landas sa pag-aaral. Pribado saved conversations ay hindi ginamit bilang source content.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Hindi. Ang mga pahina ng paghahambing ay written sa show kapag ang inspir ay isang mas mahusay una click para sa live AI tutoring, mga prompt, at mga guest pag-aaral mode, at kapag isang structured curriculum o official aklatan ng kurso may pa rin maging kapaki-pakinabang.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Hindi. Sila link lamang sa mga pampublikong pahina, mga pampublikong guest mode, mga gabay, mga prompt, at mga landas sa pag-aaral. Mga pribadong naka-save na chat stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Hindi across bawat pag-aaral kailangan. Khan Academy ay kapaki-pakinabang para sa structured lessons at pagsasanay. ang inspir ay kapaki-pakinabang kapag isang mag-aaral kailangan live AI tulong, Socratic mga tanong, mga hint, mga quiz, mga flashcard, feedback, o isang workflow sa pag-aaral sa paligid ng ang eksakto thing sila ay working sa.

entries.value: Paste ang tanong, ano ikaw tried, at ang stuck punto. Humingi ng ang smallest kapaki-pakinabang hint, hindi ang huling sagot.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Mga tao sino Matutunan ang mas mahusay sa pamamagitan ng conversation, mga tanong, mga quiz, at mga flashcard.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, at exercises ay pinakamalakas kapag ang mag-aaral alam ang paksa sequence.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Pampubliko mga mode ay tuned para sa mga paliwanag, Socratic mga tanong, mga hint, hakbang sinusuri, mga quiz, at repaso.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Pampubliko paksa URLs let searches such bilang AI Socratic tutor, AI Homework Coach, AI Flashcard Builder, at Makipag-usap kay pangkasaysayan figures AI land directly sa ang matching mode.

entries.source: Socratic AI tutor for students
entries.value: Socratic AI tutor para sa mga estudyante

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Some searches kailangan isang aklatan ng kurso. Some kailangan isang live AI tutor, isang hint, isang Socratic tanong, isang quiz, o isang flashcard deck. Mga ito mga pahina Gumawa ng na pagpili mas malinaw.

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: Magsimula here

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Magsimulang matuto

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Structured Magsanay ng tumutulong Bumuo ng foundations bago at pagkatapos homework.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Mga estudyante sino gusto mga hint o hakbang sinusuri nang walang answer-copying.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Mga guro o mga magulang evaluating nakapokus AI mga asal sa pag-aaral bago isang paaralan deployment.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Ang paghahambing searches ito hub ay ginawa sa sagot.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Ang punto ay hindi sa flatten dalawa different mga tool tungo sa isa winner. Ang punto ay sa match ang gawain sa pag-aaral sa ang behavior na tumutulong pinakamabilis.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Ang searches ito pahina ay designed sa sagot.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Mga ito ay ang high-intent moments kung saan isang mag-aaral karaniwan kailangan isang live pagtuturo behavior rather kaysa another broad pahina.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Mga ito phrases ay surfaced naturally sa ang pahina at sa structured discovery files kaya crawlers Maaari bang understand ang eksakto paghahambing intent.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Ito ay hindi isang pahayag na mga mag-aaral Dapat bang angbandon Khan Academy. Para sa marami mga paksa, isang trusted lesson aklatan at isang live Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI work pinakamahusay together: Matutunan ang foundation, pagkatapos Gamitin inspir sa Magtanong, repair confusion, magsanay recall, o get unstuck.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: Tool paghahambing

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Subukan ang live AI landas sa pag-aaral.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Gawing ang paliwanag tungo sa quiz mga tanong, mga flashcard, at isang Repasuhin schedule based sa ano ikaw miss.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Pagtuturo

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Gamitin isang live mode Kapag ikaw alam ang eksakto punto ng confusion at gusto ang susunod paliwanag, tanong, hint, o loop sa pagrepaso.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Gamitin isang structured lesson Kapag ikaw alam ang course area at gusto isang sequenced paliwanag o Magsanay ng set.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Gamitin mga kaso

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Gamitin mga pahina ng paghahambing sa ruta search tungo sa action.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Gamitin inspir una Kapag ikawr search ay tungkol sa isang action: Ipaliwanag ang ito simple, Tanungin mo ako Socratic mga tanong, Bigyan mo ako ng isang homework hint, suriin aking math hakbang, quiz ako, Bumuo ng mga flashcard, debate ito paksa, o Tulungan mo akong magplano revision.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Gamitin inspir sa Gawing confusion tungo sa mga tanong, mga halimbawa, retrieval pagsasanay, feedback sa pagsusulat, debate, at isang personal study plano.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Gamitin inspir kapag ang stuck punto ay tiyak.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Gamitin inspir Kapag ikaw gusto isang libre pampubliko Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI na Maaari bang ipaliwanag, tanong, quiz, coach homework, Bumuo ng mga flashcard, at umangkop sa ang eksakto thing ikaw ay stuck sa.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Gamitin structured lessons kapag ang landas ay kilala.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Gamitin ang paghahambing below sa pumili ang una pampubliko mode o gabay.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Gamitin ang lesson aklatan matuto ang official sequence at magsanay core skills.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Gamitin ang tama tool para sa ang gawain sa pag-aaral.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Gamitin Oras Travel o Pangkasaysayan Tao mode, habang keeping generated dialogue separate mula sa dokumentado mga source.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: Gusto ang live pag-aaral version tama now?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: Kailan ko dapat unang gamitin ang inspir?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: Kailan gamitin

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Kapag gamitin {value1}, at kailan buksan ang inspir.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: Bakit kailangang gumawa ng mga pahina ng paghahambing?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Oo. Isang mahusay workflow ay matuto ang foundation mula sa isang trusted lesson source, pagkatapos Gamitin inspir magtanong follow-up mga tanong, magsanay recall, repair mga maling akala, at Magplano ng ano magrepaso susunod.
